# SEND-PUBLISH-CONTACT — External Action

## When

Use inside EXTERNAL when the action is straightforward.

## Purpose

Make one external move without opening a full campaign.

## Inputs

- Recipient/platform
- Draft or artifact
- Link or attachment
- Minimal context

## Steps minimum

1. Identify target.
2. Write or adapt the short message.
3. Attach/link the artifact if needed.
4. Send/publish/contact.
5. Save evidence if useful.

## Output

One external action.

## Tick valid when

The action has left the private system.

## Stop rule

One action. Do not branch into a full contact strategy unless scheduled.
